judge_result.short_rationale: Core action to rinse eyes for 15–20 minutes is correct and prominent. However, contact lens guidance is not source-faithful because the source requires removal after the first 5 minutes, not immediately. It also adds unsupported advice about not rubbing and not using drops, and tells the user to go to hospital immediately rather than conditioning medical attention on persistent symptoms or substantial exposure. It omits the explicit source-backed warning not to stop rinsing before the minimum period.

  "short_rationale": "Core action to rinse eyes for 15–20 minutes is correct and prominent. However, contact lens guidance is not source-faithful because the source requires removal after the first 5 minutes, not immediately. It also adds unsupported advice about not rubbing and not using drops, and tells the user to go to hospital immediately rather than conditioning medical attention on persistent symptoms or substantial exposure. It omits the explicit source-backed warning not to stop rinsing before the minimum period."
